architecture.summary: Last-write-wins for signal JSON, decoupled from in-memory types, reads markdown output files from living-docs. Uses existing skill-creator plugin for SKILL.md generation.

integrations.summary: Hooks into LifecycleHookDispatcher.onIncrementDone, living-docs-sync. Drift detection non-blocking warn-only. Docs deploy via existing Cloudflare Pages CI.

ui-ux.summary: Console log suggestions with command hint. Skill-gen uses natural language conversation flow, no interactive CLI menus.

performance.summary: N/A - CLI tool, no performance SLAs. Signal file is small JSON, no scaling concerns.

security.summary: N/A - Local file operations only, no auth/PII/network concerns.

edge-cases.summary: Last-write-wins concurrency. Permanent decline per pattern ID. Semantic grouping by category slug, not exact library names. Drift detection error-isolated.
